member.name: T:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo
member.summary: Provide some assembly information

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo.AssemblyTitle
member.summary: Return the title of the assembly

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo.AssemblyVersion
member.summary: Return the version of the assembly

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo.AssemblyDescription
member.summary: Return the description of the assembly

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo.AssemblyProduct
member.summary: Return the product name of the assembly

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo.AssemblyCopyright
member.summary: Return the copyright of the assembly

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.AssemblyInfo.AssemblyCompany
member.summary: Return the company name of the assembly

member.name: T:BlackAndWhite.Localization
member.summary: Eine stark typisierte Ressourcenklasse zum Suchen von lokalisierten Zeichenfolgen usw.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.ResourceManager
member.summary: Gibt die zwischengespeicherte ResourceManager-Instanz zurück, die von dieser Klasse verwendet wird.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.Culture
member.summary: Überschreibt die CurrentUICulture-Eigenschaft des aktuellen Threads für alle Ressourcenzuordnungen, die diese stark typisierte Ressourcenklasse verwenden.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.colorNameBlack
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die schwarz ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.colorNameWhite
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die weiß ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.gamePaused
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die Das Spiel ist pausiert. Klicke auf OK, um die Pause zu beenden! ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.paused
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die Pause ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.statisticDefault
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die Klicks: 0 - Ticks: 0 - Blacks: 0 - Whites: 0 - Inverts: 0 ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.statistics
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die Klicks: {sumKlicks} - Ticks: {sumTicks} - Blacks: {numberBlacks} - Whites: {numberWhites} - Inverts: {sumInverts} ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.won
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die Gewonnen ähnelt.

member.name: P:BlackAndWhite.Localization.wonMessage
member.summary: Sucht eine lokalisierte Zeichenfolge, die Du hast mit {sumKlicks} Klicks in {sumTicks} Ticks gewonnen. ähnelt.

member.name: T:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm
member.summary: Main form for the Black and White game application

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.isGameStarted
member.summary: True if the game is started

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.sumClicks
member.summary: Sum of the clicks

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.sumTicks
member.summary: Sum of the ticks

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.numberBlacks
member.summary: Number of the black fields

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.numberWhites
member.summary: Number of the white fields

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.sumInverts
member.summary: Sum of the inverted fields

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.randomNumber
member.summary: Random number

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.stringBuilder
member.summary: String builder

member.name: F:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm._culture
member.summary: Culture info

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ApplyResourceToControl(System.ComponentModel.ComponentResourceManager,System.Windows.Forms.Control)
member.summary: Apply resources to a control and its children

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.SetStatusBarText(System.String)
member.summary: Set a specific text to the status bar

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.RandomFieldColor
member.summary: Return a randomized background color of the field

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InvertFields(System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Invert the background colors of all fields
member.param: Array of field IDs to invert

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InvertFieldColor(System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Invert the background color of a field

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InitGameBoard
member.summary: Init the game board

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InitGameBoard(System.Windows.Forms.TableLayoutPanel,System.Windows.Forms.TabPage)
member.summary: Init the game board with the specified size
member.param: The TabPage to set as parent

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InitGameBoard3X3
member.summary: Init the game board with the size 3x3

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InitGameBoard4X4
member.summary: Init the game board with the size 4x4

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InitGameBoard5X5
member.summary: Init the game board with the size 5x5

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.CountColorsInGameBoard
member.summary: Count the colors of the game board

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.IsSameColorsInGameBoard
member.summary: Check if all fields in the game board have the same color
member.returns: true if all fields have the same color, otherwise false

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.IsSameColorsInGameBoard(System.Windows.Forms.TableLayoutPanel)
member.summary: Check if all fields in the game board have the same color
member.returns: true if all fields have the same color, otherwise false

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.CheckForWinInGameBoard
member.summary: Check for win in the game board

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.CountColorsAndCheckForWinInGameBoard
member.summary: Count the colors and check for win in the game board

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.FinishGame
member.summary: Finish the game

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.MainForm_Load(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Load the main window
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.SetStatusLabel(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Set a specific text to the status bar
member.remarks: The parameter is not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.SetStatusLabelField(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Set a specific field text to the status bar
member.remarks: The parameter is not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ClearStatusLabel(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Clear the text of the status bar
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripMenuItemNewGame3x3_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Init the game board 3x3 while clicking the ToolStripMenuItem
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripMenuItemNewGame4x4_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Init the game board 4x4 while clicking the ToolStripMenuItem
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripMenuItemNewGame5x5_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Init the game board 4x4 while clicking the ToolStripMenuItem
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripMenuItemOptionLinear_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Active the linear field inverting while clicking the ToolStripMenuItem
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripMenuItemOptionDiagonal_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Active the diagonal field inverting while clicking the ToolStripMenuItem
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripMenuItemOptionCombined_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Active the combined field inverting while clicking the ToolStripMenuItem
member.remarks: The parameters and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InvertNeighbourFields(System.Object,System.EventArgs,System.UInt16[],System.UInt16[],System.UInt16[])
member.summary: Invert the neighbour fields
member.param: array with ids of the linear neighbour fields
array with ids of the diagonal neighbour fields
array with id of the own field
member.remarks: The parameter ist not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ButtonField_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Invert the neighbour fields while clicking on the button
member.remarks: The parameter ist not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripSplitButtonNewGame_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Begin a new game when the New Game split button is clicked
member.remarks: The parameter and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripButtonPause_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Pause the current game when the Pause button is clicked
Pause a new game while the ToolStripButton
member.remarks: The parameter and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.ToolStripSplitButtonLanguage_ButtonClick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.remarks: The parameter and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.Timer_Tick(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Output the statistics message on every tick
member.remarks: The parameter and are not needed, but must be indicated.

member.summary: Erforderliche Designervariable.

member.summary: Verwendete Ressourcen bereinigen.
member.param: True, wenn verwaltete Ressourcen gelöscht werden sollen; andernfalls False.

member.name: M:BlackAndWhite.BlackAndWhiteForm.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Erforderliche Methode für die Designerunterstützung. Der Inhalt der Methode darf nicht mit dem Code-Editor geändert werden.

T:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable
member.summary: Provide Office 2007 Blue Theme colors

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.#ctor
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the Office2007ColorTable class.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonPressedGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used when the button is pressed down.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonPressedGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used when the button is pressed down.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonPressedGradientMiddle
member.summary: Gets the middle color of the gradient used when the button is pressed down.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonSelectedGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used when the button is selected.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonSelectedGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used when the button is selected.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonSelectedGradientMiddle
member.summary: Gets the middle color of the gradient used when the button is selected.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ButtonSelectedHighlightBorder
member.summary: Gets the border color to use with ButtonSelectedHighlight.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.CheckBackground
member.summary: Gets the solid color to use when the check box is selected and gradients are being used.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.GripDark
member.summary: Gets the color to use for shadow effects on the grip or move handle.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.GripLight
member.summary: Gets the color to use for highlight effects on the grip or move handle.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ImageMarginGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the image margin of a ToolStripDropDownMenu.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuBorder
member.summary: Gets the border color or a MenuStrip.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuItemPressedGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used when a top-level ToolStripMenuItem is pressed down.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuItemPressedGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used when a top-level ToolStripMenuItem is pressed down.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuItemPressedGradientMiddle
member.summary: Gets the middle color of the gradient used when a top-level ToolStripMenuItem is pressed down.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuItemSelectedGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used when the ToolStripMenuItem is selected.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuItemSelectedGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used when the ToolStripMenuItem is selected.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuStripGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the MenuStrip.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.MenuStripGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used in the MenuStrip.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.OverflowButtonGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the ToolStripOverflowButton.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.OverflowButtonGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used in the ToolStripOverflowButton.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.OverflowButtonGradientMiddle
member.summary: Gets the middle color of the gradient used in the ToolStripOverflowButton.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.RaftingContainerGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the ToolStripContainer.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.RaftingContainerGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used in the ToolStripContainer.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.SeparatorDark
member.summary: Gets the color to use to for shadow effects on the ToolStripSeparator.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.SeparatorLight
member.summary: Gets the color to use to for highlight effects on the ToolStripSeparator.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.StatusStripGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used on the StatusStrip.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.StatusStripGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used on the StatusStrip.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripBorder
member.summary: Gets the border color to use on the bottom edge of the ToolStrip.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripContentPanelGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the ToolStripContentPanel.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripContentPanelGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used in the ToolStripContentPanel.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripDropDownBackground
member.summary: Gets the solid background color of the ToolStripDropDown.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the ToolStrip background.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used in the ToolStrip background.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripGradientMiddle
member.summary: Gets the middle color of the gradient used in the ToolStrip background.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripPanelGradientBegin
member.summary: Gets the starting color of the gradient used in the ToolStripPanel.

member.name: P:Office2007Rendering.Office2007ColorTable.ToolStripPanelGradientEnd
member.summary: Gets the end color of the gradient used in the ToolStripPanel.

member.name: T:Office2007Rendering.UseAntiAlias
member.summary: Set the SmoothingMode=AntiAlias until instance disposed.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseAntiAlias.#ctor(System.Drawing.Graphics)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the UseAntiAlias class.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseAntiAlias.Dispose
member.summary: Revert the SmoothingMode back to original setting.

member.name: T:Office2007Rendering.UseClearTypeGridFit
member.summary: Set the TextRenderingHint.ClearTypeGridFit until instance disposed.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseClearTypeGridFit.#ctor(System.Drawing.Graphics)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the UseClearTypeGridFit class.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseClearTypeGridFit.Dispose
member.summary: Revert the TextRenderingHint back to original setting.

member.name: T:Office2007Rendering.UseClipping
member.summary: Set the clipping region until instance disposed.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseClipping.#ctor(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Drawing.Drawing2D.GraphicsPath)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the UseClipping class.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseClipping.#ctor(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Drawing.Region)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the UseClipping class.

member.name: M:Office2007Rendering.UseClipping.Dispose
member.summary: Revert clipping back to origina setting.

member.summary: Draw ToolStrips using the Office 2007 themed appearance.

member.param: An ToolStripArrowRenderEventArgs containing the event data.
